genre_refs: WPA/Soviet socialist-realism worker poster; 1930s-1940s vintage illustration style
description: Vertical, AI-generated illustrated poster in a mid-20th-century socialist-realist / WPA style. It depicts a square-jawed young white male worker with neatly coiffed reddish-brown hair, looking off to the upper left. He wears a bright-green button-up work shirt with two chest pockets and a brown leather belt. Behind him is an illustrated skyline of pale-pink and sepia buildings and tall construction tower cranes against a blue cloud-streaked sky. Across the very top in large bold blue capital letters is the text 'BUILDING THE FUTURE' (partly cropped by the worker's head). A small circular U.S. Department of Labor seal appears in the lower-right corner. The illustration is smooth, painterly, and airbrushed.
